title: Zanowach #2182
definition:
Zanoah = "cast off"

 1) a city in the low country of Judah
 2) a city in the mountains of Judah, perhaps southwest of Hebron
nasbUsage:
Definition: Zanoah = "cast off"

 1) a city in the low country of Judah
 2) a city in the mountains of Judah, perhaps southwest of Hebron

    NASB:  two cities in Judah
